actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The griffon makes two Rend attacks.

actions.name: Rend
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) Piercing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 14) from both of the griffon's front claws.

tactical_info.environment: Mountain peaks, high clifftops, ancient ruins with tall structures, aerial hunting grounds
tactical_info.tactics: Grapples and carries off smaller prey, uses flight for hit-and-run attacks, keen perception for hunting
tactical_info.weaknesses: Once grounded loses major advantage, grapple can be broken, animal intelligence limits complex tactics
